svg.title: Local SEO for Kenyan Clinics — Google Business Profile Optimisation Checklist
svg.text: Google Business Profile Optimisation Checklist — Nairobi & Mombasa Healthcare Practices
"Specialty + Location" searches — "dentist Kilimani" / "gynecologist Westlands" / "pediatrician Karen Nairobi"
HIGH-VALUE LOCAL SEARCH QUERIES FOR NAIROBI CLINIC WEBSITES
GOOGLE BUSINESS PROFILE — COMPLETE OPTIMISATION CHECKLIST
NHIF acceptance added as service attribute
Add SHA accreditation as attribute from Oct 2024
Business name matches exactly on website + GBP
NAP consistency (Name, Address, Phone) across all platforms
Saturday hours especially critical — inconsistency reduces trust signals
Services listed with individual service entries
Each dental/medical service = separate GBP service entry
WhatsApp number listed as primary contact
Use Safaricom number — matches patient expectation
Mention KMPDC registration in GBP description field
Patients navigate by landmarks — exterior photo helps location identification
First impression of what patients will experience
Equipment visible builds clinical credibility signals
Verified on Google Maps — stock photos reduce trust when cross-referenced
"Thank you for visiting [Clinic Name] today. If you had a good experience, we
would be grateful for a Google review: [short link]"
Respond to every review — positive and negative
Google uses review response activity as local ranking signal
Kenyan patients read negative reviews + responses before booking
Never respond defensively to negative reviews — acknowledge, apologise, offer to resolve
Strong review profile + high response rate = better Google Maps rank for Nairobi clinic queries
Display reviews as screenshots on clinic website
Google reviews = third-party validated (cannot be fabricated) — Kenyan patients trust these
One GBP per physical location — e.g., "Clinic Name — Westlands" and "Clinic Name — Karen"
Each branch = dedicated website page with unique content
Unique address, phone, Google Maps embed, doctors at that branch, directions
Do NOT use a single multi-location page
Generic multi-location pages do not rank locally for any individual branch
MEDICAL SCHEMA MARKUP — Structured Data for Enhanced Google Search Results
DOCTOR PROFILE PAGE — MANDATORY ELEMENTS (Converts specialist searches)
"My focus is making orthodontic care accessible and comfortable for every Kenyan patient..."
Personal statement — 2–3 sentences, first person, specific
Professional photo — clinical setting, real person
Years of practice in Kenya (specific number)
Conditions treated — linked to service pages
Dentist addition: BDS university, dental specialty, before/after gallery
WHY LOCAL SEO IS THE HIGHEST-ROI INVESTMENT FOR KENYAN CLINICS
Google Maps results appear ABOVE organic search results for healthcare queries in Nairobi — "cardiologist near me" / "orthodontist Westlands"
Local pack clicks = patients who have already decided they need the service — choosing between providers — highest conversion intent
